LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; INDEX. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leslie V. Freeman, Esq., of Weinberg Roger Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, appearing for petitioners and moving party.

No other Appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Petition To Confirm ARBITRATION AWARD is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
